info.title: Measurement Concept Instance
info.description: The Measurement Concept Instance API enables you to retrieve instances of measurement concepts and to invoke and drive the processes for creating and changing them. An instance, which is based on the physical location structures and commercial definitions of a given measurement concept, represents the actual installation of an end customer.

patch.summary: Patch call to provide values for formula variables of assignment type Instance Value for a measurement concept instance.
patch.description: This operation updates the Operand Mapping table with the values for formula variables of assignment type Instance Value for a measurement concept instance version of SAP Utilities Core foundation. Variables that are not of type Instance Value cannot be updated. When you select assignment type Instance Value for formula variables in the Measurement Concept Model, you need to provide the values that fill these formula variables in the Measurement Concept Instance. For more information, refer to the [API Guide]( https://help.sap.com/docs/Cloud_for_Utilities_Foundation/964850841e2943659444c83c00f05dcc/39d2b485b52c425ba1c5f1121362f239.html?locale=en-US&version=Cloud).

patch.summary: Changes a metering location of a measurement concept instance.
patch.description: This operation changes a metering location of a measurement concept instance using the ID of the metering location and the ID of the measurement concept instance to which the metering location is assigned. For important information about updating measurement concept instances, refer to the [API Guide](https://help.sap.com/docs/Cloud_for_Utilities_Foundation/964850841e2943659444c83c00f05dcc/39d2b485b52c425ba1c5f1121362f239.html?locale=en-US&version=Cloud). Metering locations are where the consumer's consumption of energy from and generation of energy to the grid are measured. The types of metering locations are for comparative measurements, difference measurements, generators, grid measurements, serial switching, and storage measurements.

post.summary: Cancel a Measurement Concept Instance Version.
post.description: This operation cancels measurement concept instance versions of SAP Utilities Core foundation. MCM instance versions that are not in the status ‘active’ can be cancelled. You might need to do this, for example, if you triggered the process using incorrect data.When you cancel an MCM instance version, you revoke the process steps and cancel all process documents that have already been carried out in that version. For more-information about the cancellation of measurement concept instance versions, refer to the [API Guide]( https://help.sap.com/docs/Cloud_for_Utilities_Foundation/39a9e8c04a4943b69d6851aefcdf0f4d/d82eec2df077462f92567971c1279cfa.html?locale=en-US&version=Cloud).

connectionUser.description: The ID of the user of the utility connection that is provided with the measurement concept instance.

connectionOwner.description: The ID of the owner of the utility connection that is provided with the measurement concept instance.

forecastBasis_code.description: The code of the forecast basis of the market location. The forecast bases ```RLM```, ```REM```, and ```HO``` are supported.

consumptionDistribution.description: The consumption distribution of the market location. This is, for example, temperature-dependent.

flatrateType_code.description: The code of the type of flat rate.

flatrate.description: The flat rate of the market location. This parameter is mandatory for market locations of the type ```FLATRATE```.

classification.description: The classification of a market location such as household, streetlight, shop, and restaurant.

directSelling.description: Indicates whether the market location supports direct selling.

connectionOperator.description: The operator of the connection of the market location. The value of this parameter must not be null if there is at least one actor of type ```PRODUCER``` that is assigned to the market location.

locationIdentifierReady.description: Indicates whether the completion of settings point of delivery IDs can be signaled.

masterDataReady.description: Indicates whether all parameters related to master data readiness are set to ```True```.

commercialSetupDate.description: The date on which the setup activities for billing, settlement, and other commercial data processing are completed.

locationComplete.description: Indicates whether the setup for billing, settlement, and other commercial data processing is completed for the entire scope of the measurement concept instance.

locationRemoved.description: Indicates whether the market location is removed.

removalDate.description: The date on which the market location is removed.

communalInstallation.description: The communal installation of the market location.
